content: We can frame Self-Refine’s iterative self-feedback framework as a foundational structural backbone for building multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where each self-refinement iteration can be anchored to a distinct inconsistent solving perspective from self-reflection research to surface uncaught flaws that single-perspective refinement misses. This creates a zero-training hybrid self-improvement system that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of needing no additional supervised data or reinforcement learning.
